name: Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of synthetic diamonds and related products. The company offers raw and auxiliary materials, diamond fine grit, single crystal diamonds, diamond micro powder, diamond wire saws, diamond wheels, single crystal cutters, and diamond synthetic press. The company offers its products in China, the United States, Canada, Germany, France, Italy, Poland, Austria, the Czech Republic, the United Kingdom, Brazil, South Africa, India, South Korea, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and internationally. Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
